issues.description: Trigger value 'Trigger' is invalid. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn. 'Trigger' alone is not a valid trigger type.
No condition specified. 'Trigger' effect requires a condition (e.g., Always, TurnCount, HasRestingDon, etc.) to define when the trigger fires.
